title: phaseolus vulgaris var. nanus
intro: Phaseolus vulgaris var. nanus, commonly known as the 'Dwarf Bean', is a compact, bushy variety of the common bean plant. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phaseolus vulgaris var. nanus include its ability to help lower cholesterol levels, regulate blood sugar, and support cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, capsules, and extracts, which are often used to promote digestive health and reduce inflammation.
